title: Immersive MC with no shaders
description: Make Minecraft Look Great without Shaders
body:
This modpack is built on a simple premise: a beautiful Minecraft experience should be accessible to everyone, not just those with high-end PCs. We've assembled the best visual mods to give you that "shader look" without any significant performance cost. It's a new modpack so more and better updates will be coming up soon. ## Features: ### Colored Fog ![Colored Fogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b550b785d0d5c110068a690e9290b1fee692f610.jpeg) ### Better Clouds ![Better Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b103775626bf0403a105a3ae23e8c81d2701fc4_0.webp) ### 3D Crops ![3D Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b74e3331899b06773ac6a4524acec3a755b54c4.jpeg)
